name: Baked Chicken Chimichangas
recipeIngredient: 6 10-inch flour tortillas; flexible ones. If stiff, warm before filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix the cooked shredded chicken with olive oil.
3. Add chopped onion and minced garlic to the bowl; stir until combined.
4. Stir in chili powder, salsa, cumin, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Warm the tortillas if they are stiff, then fold them into chimichangas shape.
6. Stuff each tortilla with the chicken mixture, making sure to seal the ends well.
7. Heat olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium heat.
8. Place stuffed tortillas in the skillet and fry until golden brown on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
9. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-15 minutes or until heated through.
10. Remove from oven and serve hot with refried beans on the side.
